vi-√nam P. Ā. -namati, ˚te, to bend down, bow down, stoop,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.:
Caus. -nāmayati, or -namayati (ind.p. -nāmya and -namayya), to bend down, incline, bend (a bow),  MBh. ;  Hariv.  ;
(in gram.) to cerebralize or change into a cerebral letter (cf. -nāmita).
